metadata.description: A person in their 40s, appearing female, has olive skin with visible freckles across the nose and cheeks, and some fine lines on the forehead. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. The hair is very short, buzzed, dark brown, and closely cropped to the scalp, revealing a natural hairline. The eyes are almond-shaped and amber-brown, set slightly wide apart, with thin, dark, arched eyebrows. The nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip, while the lips are medium-thick with a natural, soft curve. The overall impression is of a person with a thoughtful expression, looking off to the right, with their head angled slightly down and to the right.
